name: ai-context-orchestrator
description: Generate project context and launch Claude, Gemini, or Copilot with it.

commands.title: AI Context Orchestrator: Generate Context File

aiContextOrchestrator.readmePreviewLines.description: Number of README lines included in the generated context file.

aiContextOrchestrator.contextFilePreview.description: Number of lines to include from assistant-specific instruction files such as CLAUDE.md or GEMINI.md.

aiContextOrchestrator.extraContextFiles.description: Additional workspace-relative files to append into .ai-context.md when present.

aiContextOrchestrator.showIgnoredDirecto.description: Show ignored directories such as node_modules in the tree, but mark them as excluded without listing their contents.

aiContextOrchestrator.maxEntriesPerDirec.description: Maximum number of displayed files and directories per folder before the rest are summarized as omitted.

aiContextOrchestrator.optimizeWithCopilo.description: Use an available Copilot chat model to rewrite the generated context into a more compact prompt before saving .ai-context.md.

aiContextOrchestrator.modelFamily.description: Optional Copilot model family passed to vscode.lm.selectChatModels, for example gpt-4o. Leave empty to use any available Copilot model.

aiContextOrchestrator.autoGenerateOnStar.description: Automatically generate .ai-context.md when a workspace opens. External assistants are not launched automatically.

aiContextOrchestrator.defaultPreset.description: Default workflow preset used when the extension auto-generates a context pack.

aiContextOrchestrator.defaultProvider.description: Default provider target for generated workflow plans.

aiContextOrchestrator.contextRefreshMode.description: How workflow runs should refresh the context pack: reuse the existing file, compare a workspace signature, or always rebuild.

aiContextOrchestrator.costProfile.description: Default model cost policy used to prepare workflow roles and optimization behavior.

aiContextOrchestrator.generateNativeArti.description: Generate provider-native instruction, agent, and skill files alongside .ai-context.md.

aiContextOrchestrator.enabledProviders.description: Providers shown in the workflow picker. Remove entries to hide providers you do not use.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
